query_title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby: Her

recommendations.title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby: Him
recommendations.overview: Told from the man's perspective, the story of a couple trying to reclaim the life and love they once knew and pick up the pieces of a past that may be too far gone.

recommendations.title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby: Them
recommendations.overview: A New York couple's relationship is tested after the loss of their child. This film is the wide-released combination of the original two :him and :her volumes that premiered at the Cannes Film Festival.

recommendations.title: Love, Simon
recommendations.overview: Everyone deserves a great love story, but for 17-year-old Simon Spier, it's a little more complicated. He hasn't told his family or friends that he's gay, and he doesn't know the identity of the anonymous classmate that he's fallen for online.

recommendations.title: The Greatest Hits
recommendations.overview: Harriet finds art imitating life when she discovers certain songs can transport her back in time – literally. While she relives the past through romantic memories of her former boyfriend, her time travelling collides with a burgeoning new love intere

recommendations.title: The Notebook
recommendations.overview: An epic love story centered around an older man who reads aloud to a woman with Alzheimer's. From a faded notebook, the old man's words bring to life the story about a couple who is separated by World War II, and is then passionately reunited, seven

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Letters from Iwo Jima
recommendations.overview: The story of the battle of Iwo Jima between the United States and Imperial Japan during World War II, as told from the perspective of the Japanese who fought it.

recommendations.title: Moonlight
recommendations.overview: The tender, heartbreaking story of a young man’s struggle to find himself, told across three defining chapters in his life as he experiences the ecstasy, pain, and beauty of falling in love, while grappling with his own sexuality.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.
